subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and was evidence of a new spirit, for unknown souls have arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و دلیل بر روح جدید بود چون نفوسی مجهوله قیام
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @equality of men and women
